name: cable
description: Cable elements model axial reinforcement with grout interaction. They are used for cable bolts, tendons, and support members where axial tensile capacity dominates.

notes: spacing is a FLAC2D-only out-of-plane spacing property.

common_patterns.name: Basic grouted cable
commands: structure cable property young 2e11 cross-sectional-area 5e-4 grout-stiffness 1e9 grout-cohesion 1e5 grout-friction 30

common_patterns.name: Pretension and release
commands: structure cable apply tension value 1000 range group 'pretension'
structure cable apply tension active off range group 'pretension'
